problems.diagnostic: AADL Inspector diagnostics indicate that Target and Actual port specs point to Types::speed.speed_impl, which is not of an adequate kind
problems.minimal_edit: Change the type of Target and Actual ports to a compatible type, such as Base_Types::Float

executor_steps: Open the AADL model and navigate to the Speed_Control system
Select the Target and Actual ports
Change the type of both ports to Base_Types::Float
